title: Transparency and reproducibility package for: Beyond-AHI hypoxic metrics and hard cardiovascular and mortality outcomes in adult OSA-related cohorts
description: Repository-ready transparency package containing the final executed search appendix, screening and full-text review logs, extraction and synthesis tables, risk-of-bias source file, final export script, and final upload-ready figure files supporting the OSA beyond-AHI hypoxic-metrics systematic review and meta-analysis. Replace this description with the final DOI-bearing text if a GitHub release is archived to Zenodo.
